summary: Frontend-only testing completed for remakepix.com debug environment. All i18n translations working correctly, no raw keys visible. Frontend loads and renders properly. Backend API unavailable (expected - Vercel Serverless Functions require production environment).

notes.impact: Cannot test authentication or API integration
notes.reason: Vercel Serverless Functions (frontend/api/[...path].js) require production Vercel environment with MongoDB, Replicate API tokens, and other production env vars. This is NOT a FastAPI backend.
notes.fix_priority: N/A - Expected behavior in debug environment

integration_issues.issue: Login button disabled due to backend API unavailability
integration_issues.impact: Cannot test authenticated pages or upload functionality
integration_issues.reason: Backend API returns 502 - Vercel Serverless Functions not available in debug environment

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'GOOGLE LOGIN · FALTA CLIENT ID' (missing Google client ID)
integration_issues.reason: Production Google OAuth client ID not configured in debug environment

passed_tests: ✅ Landing page loads successfully with proper hero text and styling
✅ Login page renders correctly with proper form fields
✅ Navigation between pages works (landing → login → tools)
✅ i18n translations working - NO raw keys visible (vid_tab_generate, vid_edit_video_label, etc. all properly translated)
✅ Frontend build succeeds - CRA dev server running on port 3000
✅ vercel.json has both API patterns: 'frontend/api/**/*.js' and 'api/**/*.js'
✅ StudioMediaPicker component code uses proper i18n keys (t('upload_empty_label'), t('upload_empty_hint'), etc.)
✅ StudioVideoUpload component code uses proper i18n keys (t('vid_upload_remove'), t('vid_edit_large_hint'), etc.)
✅ Video page component uses proper i18n keys (t('vid_tab_generate'), t('vid_tab_editor'), etc.)
✅ i18n initialization correct - react-i18next with fallback mechanism and merged studio locales
✅ No console errors related to frontend code - only expected backend API 502 errors
✅ Responsive design - proper viewport and styling
✅ Dark theme styling consistent across pages

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All frontend rendering and i18n tests passed
success_percentage.backend: N/A - Backend API not available in debug environment (expected)

action_item_for_main_agent: ✅ All requested frontend tests PASSED. The i18n translations are working correctly (no raw keys like 'vid_tab_generate' or 'vid_edit_video_label' visible). Frontend loads without errors. Navigation works. Upload zones use proper i18n labels in code. Backend API unavailability is EXPECTED - Vercel Serverless Functions require production environment. No fixes needed.
notes: This is NOT a standard FastAPI+React app - backend is Vercel Serverless Functions
Backend API 502 errors are EXPECTED - functions require Vercel production environment
Cannot test actual upload/generation - requires Vercel Blob tokens and Replicate API tokens (production only)
Test credentials exist but cannot be used due to backend API unavailability
All i18n keys properly resolve to translated text - no raw keys visible in UI
Frontend code review confirms proper use of t() function for all translations
StudioMediaPicker accepts image files (code verified - cannot test runtime without auth)
Upload zones have proper labels in code (verified via code review)
Video upload area shows proper translated text in code (verified via code review)
